title: Playtime Placeholder for TAB
description: Adds a simple and clean %playtime% placeholder for TAB, showing how long a player has been playing on the server ⏱️
body:
📌 Playtime Placeholder for TAB

Adds a simple and clean %playtime% placeholder for TAB, showing how long a player has been playing on the server ⏱️

✨ Features

+ ⏳ Displays total player playtime

+ ⚡ Works FAST with no database

+ 🔌 Full integration with TAB API

+ 🔄 Updates automatically every second

+ 🧩 Easy to use — just %playtime%

  

📥 Requirements

+ TAB plugin

🛠️ Usage

Just add this to your TAB config:

```
%playtime%
```
example:

```
&aYour playtime: %playtime%
```


📦 Notes

+ This plugin uses Minecraft’s built-in statistics, which means:

+ no database required

+ minimal performance impact

+ works out of the box
